## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

List the commands and scenarios used to test the change.

## Compatibility

Describe any config, behavior, package, or migration impact. Write `None` when
there is no compatibility impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests from `TESTING.md`.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I added or updated a render fixture or Go test for behavior changes.
- [ ] I removed secrets, credentials, private hostnames, real IP inventories,
      and debug-only files.
- [ ] I will report security-sensitive details privately according to
      `SECURITY.md`.

Polish version: [pull_request_template_PL.md](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/pull_request_template_PL.md)
